mapper.insert: INSERT INTO service_comment (appointment_id, service_id, user_id, user_name, rating, content, images) VALUES (#{appointmentId}, #{serviceId}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{rating}, #{content}, #{images})
mapper.select: SELECT c.*, u.avatar as user_avatar, u.nickname as user_nickname, s.name as service_name FROM service_comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN service_item s ON c.service_id = s.id WHERE c.service_id = #{serviceId} AND c.status = 1 ORDER BY c.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM service_comment WHERE service_id = #{serviceId} AND status = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE service_comment SET reply = #{reply}, reply_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE service_comment SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT ROUND(AVG(rating), 1) as avg_rating, COUNT(*) as total_count, SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as star5, SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as star4, SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as star3, SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as star2, SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as star1 FROM service_comment WHERE service_id = #{serviceId} AND status = 1
SELECT rating, COUNT(*) as count FROM service_comment WHERE service_id = #{serviceId} AND status = 1 GROUP BY rating ORDER BY rating DESC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') as date, COUNT(*) as count FROM service_comment WHERE service_id = #{serviceId} AND status = 1 AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY date ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM service_comment WHERE service_id = #{serviceId} AND status = 1 AND reply IS NOT NULL AND reply != ''

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM service_comment WHERE service_id = #{serviceId} AND status = 1
AND rating = #{rating}

SELECT COUNT(*) as total, ROUND(AVG(rating), 1) as avgRating, SUM(CASE WHEN reply IS NOT NULL AND reply != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as replyCount, SUM(CASE WHEN reply IS NULL OR reply = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as unreplyCount FROM service_comment WHERE status = 1

SELECT COUNT(*) as total, ROUND(AVG(rating), 1) as avgRating, SUM(CASE WHEN reply IS NOT NULL AND reply != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as replyCount, SUM(CASE WHEN reply IS NULL OR reply = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as unreplyCount FROM service_comment sc LEFT JOIN appointment a ON sc.appointment_id = a.id WHERE sc.status = 1 AND a.staff_id = #{staffId}

SELECT sc.id, sc.appointment_id, sc.service_id, sc.user_id, sc.rating, sc.content, sc.images, sc.reply, sc.reply_time, sc.status, sc.create_time, s.name as service_name, s.price as service_price, s.image as service_image, u.username as user_name, u.nickname as user_nickname, u.avatar as user_avatar FROM service_comment sc LEFT JOIN service_item s ON sc.service_id = s.id LEFT JOIN user u ON sc.user_id = u.id WHERE sc.user_id = #{userId} AND sc.status = 1 AND s.id IS NOT NULL AND s.status = 1 ORDER BY sc.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM service_comment sc LEFT JOIN service_item s ON sc.service_id = s.id WHERE sc.user_id = #{userId} AND sc.status = 1 AND s.id IS NOT NULL AND s.status = 1
